description_long: This rifle features a weathered, light-colored body with a wooden fixed stock and a prominent scope mounted on top, suggesting it is designed for precision shooting. The barrel is long and appears to be standard, with a cylindrical suppressor attached at the muzzle. The receiver and handguard are finished in a pale, almost desert-camouflage tone, contrasting with the darker wood of the stock and grip. A detachable box magazine is visible beneath the receiver, and the trigger guard is robust and squared. The scope is mounted on a rail system, and the rifle includes a sling for carrying. The overall design is utilitarian, blending modern tactical elements with classic wooden components.
description: A weathered rifle with a wooden fixed stock, mounted scope, and a suppressor on a long, pale barrel. It features a detachable box magazine and a utilitarian, tactical design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden stock, mounted scope, and the full length of the suppressor-tipped barrel.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the scope, the top rail, and the cylindrical suppressor at the muzzle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the detachable box magazine, trigger guard, and the wooden grip and stock.
description_view_3: Angled view from the front, focusing on the suppressor, barrel, and the alignment of the scope.
